description: Configure the WordPress site for a bilingual audience using the Polylang plugin with English (en_US) as the default and French (fr_FR) as the additional language. Translate the existing English post 'Acquisition of TechCorp Announced' and its category 'Press Releases' into French. The French category must be named 'Communiqués de presse' and the French post must be titled 'Annonce de l'acquisition de TechCorp' containing the text: 'Nous sommes ravis d'annoncer l'acquisition de TechCorp. Cette étape stratégique renforcera notre présence sur le marché mondial.' The French category and post must be formally linked as translations of their English counterparts and published.
